subcodes.first_line: O divine Flame of the heavenly Mount Paran! During thy sojourn and movement throughout the regions of America, the opportunity for inscribing even a moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر نار فاران الهی در مدت سیر و حرکت در صفحات امریک فرصت تحریر لحظه و
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
